expectations.text: Does not propose personally reading the five auth files as the first step (no direct Read of the module files before any delegation)
expectations.evidence: "I do not read handlers.go/middleware.go/session.go/tokens.go/store.go myself at any point in this sequence unless… adjudicating a disagreement — even then, that's a last resort."

expectations.text: First delegation is read-only reconnaissance (scout-role) whose prompt demands path:line-anchored findings
expectations.evidence: First dispatch is the scout recon on the fallback path; "Acceptance check: Every claim in your inventory carries a path:line anchor."

expectations.text: The dispatch prompt includes an explicit acceptance check and a return format (contract fields present)
expectations.evidence: Dispatch carries Context / Goal / Inputs / Constraints / Acceptance check / Return format fields, including the status-token-first return rule.

expectations.text: Architecture/boundary design is explicitly reserved for a reasoning-tier executor (deep-reasoner/Opus), not the mechanical worker and not decided by the orchestrator before recon returns
expectations.evidence: "Step 2 — relay its full inventory into a deep-reasoner dispatch (Opus)… I will decide (a) vs (b) from scout's concrete findings, not before."
